Officials suggest the pace of these purchases will be significantly reduced, moving cautiously to avoid missteps as the Fed aims for an end state.

articles.title: Over 5,000 properties acquired in Hyderabad for road widening over the past two decades
articles.description: A total 2,024 properties, accounting for 39% of the total, were acquired on the three Metro Rail corridors, to facilitate laying the railway lines

articles.title: Bongbong Marcos fights ill-health rumours with star jumps
articles.description: The Philippine President challenged anyone questioning his fitness to join him in the gym.

articles.title: CBSE Class 10th Result 2026 LIVE: Websites to check for Class 10 results when out
articles.description: CBSE Class 10th Result 2026 LIVE: Class 10 results will be announced and available on official websites. Follow the blog for latest updates.

articles.title: US, Philippines Plan Record Military Drills as War Threats Grow
articles.description: More than 17,000 military personnel will participate in the biggest-ever joint drills by the Philippines, the US and other nations as they rehearse warfighting skills amid tensions with China and conflicts in the Middle East.

articles.title: Happy Tamil New Year 2026: Puthandu 50+ wishes, messages, greetings and GIFs to share with near and dear ones
articles.description: Tamil New Year, or Puthandu, is being celebrated on 14 April, symbolizing fresh beginnings and positivity. It marks the start of the Tamil solar calendar and is observed with enthusiasm by Tamil communities worldwide.

articles.title: Be careful: Influencer's husband warns US lawmaker Eric Swalwell amid sex row
articles.description: Be careful Influencers husband warns US lawmaker Eric Swalwell amid sex row

articles.title: Speaker writes to Commissioner after fresh bomb threat to Delhi Assembly; seeks probe, tighter security
articles.description: Earlier, the Assembly had received threatening emails from Khalistan-supporting groups

topStories.title: US, Philippines Plan Record Military Drills as War Threats Grow
topStories.description: More than 17,000 military personnel will participate in the biggest-ever joint drills by the Philippines, the US and other nations as they rehearse warfighting skills amid tensions with China and conflicts in the Middle East.

topStories.title: US military kills two men in new strike on vessel in eastern Pacific
topStories.description: Latest attack brings death toll from US strikes on vessels in the Pacific and Caribbean to at least 170 since September.

topStories.title: Wall St Expects a Cautious Fed as T-Bill Demand Winds Down
topStories.description: Wall Street anticipates the Federal Reserve will adopt a gradual strategy for reducing its balance sheet expansion. The central bank began purchasing approximately $40 billion in short-term Treasuries monthly in December to alleviate funding market pressures. Officials suggest the pace of these purchases will be significantly reduced, moving cautiously to avoid missteps as the Fed aims for an end state.

topStories.title: Global Markets: Stocks gain, oil and dollar retreat on hopes for US-Iran resolution
topStories.description: Asian stocks rose as the U.S. indicated ongoing dialogue with Iran for a deal, despite port blockades. Oil prices and the dollar declined as market sentiment favored diplomacy over supply disruption fears. Investors are trading on hope for an agreement, pushing equities higher for now.

topStories.title: Former Haryana CM Hooda blames low procurement of crop on government’s “arbitrary” new rules
topStories.description: Hooda has also issued directives to all Congress MLAs and senior leaders regarding this matter, and instructed them to visit all grain markets daily, summon officials to the site, and confront them with the ground realities

topStories.title: Anti-war protesters arrested in New York urging end to Israel weapon sales
topStories.description: Police in New York arrested around 100 anti-war protesters during a sit-in demanding an end to US arms for Israel.

topStories.title: What Iran offered to do with its nuclear programme? Why did Trump walk away?
topStories.description: United States and Iran traded proposals for a suspension of Iranian nuclear activities during weekend negotiations in Pakistan, but remain far apart on the length of any agreement, according to Iranian and US officials.

topStories.title: US-Iran Deal Was 80% Done. Then A Showdown Over Tehran's Nuclear Clause
topStories.description: Tehran has reportedly proposed suspending uranium enrichment for up to five years - an offer the Trump administration rejected, insisting on 20 years

topStories.title: Bitcoin Climbs To Four-Week High On Hopes Of US-Iran Peace Talks
topStories.description: Bitcoin climbed to its highest level in four weeks, reaching around seventy four thousand four hundred dollars amid optimism over a potential US Iran peace deal.

topStories.title: Indians rush to book gold as precious metals slide
topStories.description: Gold and silver prices fell on Monday. This drop occurred after US-Iran ceasefire talks failed and President Donald Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Indians are now rushing to book gold. This is for the auspicious Akshaya Tritiya and the upcoming wedding season. Demand momentum is picking up across key markets.

topStories.title: Asian Stocks Rise On Iran Deal Hopes, Oil Falls: Markets Wrap
topStories.description: Asian stocks rose as optimism grew over a potential Iran deal after Trump signaled willingness to resume talks despite a US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.description: Deputy CM DK Shivakumar warned Congress MLAs against public dissent while they pushed for a cabinet reshuffle, stressing party discipline and unity.

dailyNews.title: What the U.S. Blockade of Iran and the Strait of Hormuz Might Look Like
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military has provided few details on how it might carry out President Trump’s orders as he seeks to pressure Tehran on a peace deal. But history and established practices offer some clues.

dailyNews.title: The U.S. Blockades Iran’s Ports
dailyNews.description: Also, Trump clashes with the pope. Here’s the latest at the end of Monday.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Explanation for an Image of Himself as Jesus: ‘I Thought It Was Me as a Doctor’
dailyNews.description: The image showed President Trump bathed in divine light and clad in religious robes. His interpretation was that the image depicted him as a doctor, not Jesus Christ.

dailyNews.title: Vance Says Pope Leo Should Stay Out of U.S. Affairs
dailyNews.description: The vice president, a Catholic, defended President Trump, who had accused the pope of being too liberal and “weak on crime.” The pontiff has said that he has “no fear of the Trump administration.”

dailyNews.title: Trump and MAGA Embraced Orban. Now, They’re Worried by His Loss in Hungary’s Election.
dailyNews.description: Viktor Orban, the Hungarian prime minister, and his right-wing playbook were embraced by parts of the American right. Now some are worried by his defeat.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Erratic Behavior and Extreme Comments Revive Mental Health Debate
dailyNews.description: As the president threatens to wipe out Iran and attacks the pope, even some former allies and advisers are questioning whether he has grown increasingly unbalanced, describing him as “lunatic” and “clearly insane.”

dailyNews.title: Pride Flag Can Fly at Stonewall After Trump Administration Reversal
dailyNews.description: The settlement ends a symbolic attack on the L.G.B.T.Q. rights movement and deals a blow to the administration’s assault on diversity initiatives.

dailyNews.title: 4/13: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump continues to slam Pope Leo over Iran opposition; Eric Swalwell announces he'll resign from Congress.

dailyNews.title: Pope says he has "no fear of the Trump administration" after president lashes out
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo has repeatedly warned that violence is becoming normalized and that religious language is at risk of being misused to justify it.

dailyNews.title: Trump deletes Truth Social image depicting him as Jesus: 'It was me as a doctor'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump in May 2025 posted an apparent AI image depicting himself as a Catholic pope after the death of Pope Francis.
